description:
Fix the confirmed workspace-transition delivery defects identified during review of bsm-kia.4.

The renderer must never show a Current Workspace identity without its matching Issue Explorer snapshot. Fix: (1) Cancel racing after backend commit but before success publication; (2) startup issue loading racing with a later switch; (3) successful retry of workspace memory that restores a backend snapshot but leaves the renderer stale; and (4) delayed same-generation Pending events overwriting an accepted retryable failure.

Also make the documented issue-list acceptance command run the atomic-switch desktop scenario, and extend desktop assertions for inline invalid-target feedback and preservation of a non-default Issue List View.

Preserve the bsm-kia.4 transaction semantics; add deterministic Rust/frontend/E2E regressions for each delivery race.
title: Harden workspace transition delivery races
